response.justification: While the candidate demonstrates strong software engineering fundamentals, mentorship, and versatility across 15+ years, they lack the critical domain expertise required for this role. Their C++ experience is dated (2012), their primary recent focus is TypeScript/Node.js and AI infrastructure, and they have no background in industrial automation, IoT, MQTT, industrial protocols, or IEC 62443 cybersecurity standards—all core requirements. The skill gap is substantial and would require significant ramp-up time.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience with demonstrated craftsmanship, TDD practices, and mentoring ability
Experience architecting and building high-performance, scalable systems handling millions of requests, with understanding of asynchronous I/O and real-time constraints
Strong technical communication and teaching skills, evidenced by workshops, courses, and organizing knowledge-sharing sessions across teams
concerns: C++ expertise is dated (last significant work in 2012 with LabWindows/CVI) and not a primary focus; current career trajectory is TypeScript/Node.js/AI infrastructure
Zero background in industrial automation, IoT applications, MQTT, or industrial protocols (Modbus, IEC 61850, IEC 104, DNP 3.0, OPC UA); lacks domain-specific knowledge critical to the role
No experience with Secure Development Lifecycle, IEC 62443 industrial cybersecurity standards, or security practices required for this regulated industry

key_factors.factor: Recent and primary C++ development focus
IEC 62443 and secure development lifecycle experience
